summary: Completed testing of FitBeats Spotify transfer playback fix. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend pages load correctly. The new PUT /api/spotify/transfer endpoint is working. Transfer playback logic is properly implemented in frontend code.
passed_tests: PUT /api/spotify/transfer - endpoint exists and validates device_id parameter (returns 400 for missing device_id)
PUT /api/spotify/transfer - returns 401 when Spotify not connected (expected for test account)
GET /api/spotify/search?q=test - returns Spotify tracks with correct structure
Frontend login page loads correctly with email/password fields
Frontend main layout loads with sidebar, player bar, and queue panel
Frontend profile page accessible - shows Spotify 'Conectar' button
Frontend search page loads with search input and Todo/Mixes/Spotify tabs
Frontend playlists page loads - shows 'Cardio Vibes 2026' playlist
Frontend class mode page loads - shows 'HIIT Session 30min' with 2 canciones
Frontend songs page (Canciones) loads - shows all local mixes with proper track names
critical_code_review_comments: Transfer playback logic correctly implemented in App.js: transferPlayback() calls PUT /v1/me/player with device_ids
Transfer is called both on SDK ready (line 180) and before each playSpotifyTrack (line 228)
Backend /api/spotify/transfer endpoint properly validates device_id and handles Spotify API errors
Note: Actual Spotify playback cannot be verified without a real Spotify Premium account connected
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified the Spotify transfer playback fix: 1) Backend PUT /api/spotify/transfer endpoint exists and validates device_id parameter. 2) Frontend App.js has transferPlayback() function that calls PUT /v1/me/player with device_ids. 3) Transfer is called on SDK ready and before each play. 4) All backend API tests pass. 5) All frontend pages load correctly. Note: Actual Spotify playback requires a real Spotify Premium account to test - the transfer logic is in place but cannot be verified end-to-end without Premium.

features_verified.spotify_transfer_endpoint: WORKING - PUT /api/spotify/transfer validates device_id, returns 400 for missing, 401 for not connected
features_verified.spotify_search_endpoint: WORKING - returns tracks with spotify_id, name, artist, uri
features_verified.frontend_transfer_logic: IMPLEMENTED - transferPlayback() in App.js calls PUT /v1/me/player
features_verified.frontend_transfer_on_sdk_ready: IMPLEMENTED - line 180 calls transferPlayback on device ready
features_verified.frontend_transfer_before_play: IMPLEMENTED - line 228 calls transferPlayback before each play
features_verified.local_audio_playback: WORKING - songs page shows tracks, selection works
features_verified.class_mode: WORKING - HIIT Session 30min visible with 2 tracks

spotify_playback_note: The Spotify Web Playback SDK requires a real Spotify Premium account to test actual audio playback. The transfer playback logic has been verified in code but cannot be tested end-to-end without Premium. The fix adds: 1) transferPlayback() call on SDK ready, 2) transferPlayback() call before each play, 3) Backend /api/spotify/transfer as server-side fallback.
